Class FindTaclet

java.lang.Object
org.key_project.prover.rules.Taclet
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.Taclet
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.FindTaclet
All Implemented Interfaces:
Rule, HasOrigin, Named, Rule
Direct Known Subclasses:
AntecTaclet, RewriteTaclet, SuccTaclet
public abstract class FindTaclet extends Taclet
An abstract class to represent Taclets with a find part. This means, they have to be attached to a formula or term of the sequent. This class is extended by several subclasses to distinct between taclets that have to attached to a top level formula of the antecedent (AntecTaclet), to the succedent (SuccTaclet) or to an arbitrary term that matches the find part somewhere in the sequent (RewriteTaclet).

  • Constructor Details

    • FindTaclet

      protected FindTaclet(Name name, TacletApplPart applPart, ImmutableList<TacletGoalTemplate> goalTemplates, ImmutableList<RuleSet> ruleSets, TacletAttributes attrs, SyntaxElement find, ImmutableMap<@NonNull SchemaVariable, TacletPrefix> prefixMap, ChoiceExpr choices, boolean surviveSymbExec, ImmutableSet<TacletAnnotation> tacletAnnotations)
      creates a FindTaclet
      Parameters:
      name - the Name of the taclet
      applPart - the TacletApplPart that contains the if-sequent, the not-free and new-vars conditions
      goalTemplates - a IList that contains all goaltemplates of the taclet (these are the instructions used to create new goals when applying the Taclet)
      ruleSets - a ImmutableList that contains all rule sets the Taclet is attached to
      attrs - the TacletAttributes encoding if the Taclet is non-interactive, recursive or something like that
      find - the Term that is the pattern that has to be found in a sequent and the places where it matches the Taclet can be applied
      prefixMap - a ImmutableMap that contains the prefix for each SchemaVariable in the Taclet

    • FindTaclet

      protected FindTaclet(Name name, TacletApplPart applPart, ImmutableList<TacletGoalTemplate> goalTemplates, ImmutableList<RuleSet> ruleSets, TacletAttributes attrs, SyntaxElement find, ImmutableMap<@NonNull SchemaVariable, TacletPrefix> prefixMap, ChoiceExpr choices, ImmutableSet<TacletAnnotation> tacletAnnotations)
      creates a FindTaclet
      Parameters:
      name - the Name of the taclet
      applPart - the TacletApplPart that contains the if-sequent, the not-free and new-vars conditions
      goalTemplates - an ImmutableList that contains all goaltemplates of the taclet (these are the instructions used to create new goals when applying the Taclet)
      ruleSets - an ImmutableList that contains all rule sets the Taclet is attached to
      attrs - the TacletAttributes encoding if the Taclet is non-interactive, recursive or something like that
      find - the Term that is the pattern that has to be found in a sequent and the places where it matches the Taclet can be applied
      prefixMap - an ImmutableMap that contains the prefix for each SchemaVariable in the Taclet
